prompt: 这是旧项目新增需求，项目在 D:\sun-skills\prd-to-tech-design-review-workspace\fixtures\refund-app，PRD 在 docs/prd/refund-approval.md。请让 FE/BE reviewers 讨论一下现有实现兼容性，最后把技术设计保存到 docs/design/refund-approval-tech-design.md。
assertions: Output saves the requested docs/design/refund-approval-tech-design.md or an equivalent copied artifact.
Design references existing project compatibility, including current refund status/type limitations.
Design maps high-value approval threshold, manager approve/reject flow, audit, notifications, and refund processor integration.
Design includes frontend and backend reviewer perspectives or collaboration notes.
Design includes API/data/status/error/testing sections and preserves open assumptions.
